note: Seed data from initial research. The scraper merges fresh results into this file by id (category+slug).

leads.name: Corpus Christi Mercantile
leads.address: 1212 N Tancahua St, Corpus Christi, TX 78401
leads.notes: TOP lead. Clears out whole homes after a passing AND resells — books are pure overhead for them. Pitch: take the books so they don't have to price or haul them.

leads.name: Lucy's Estate Sales
leads.notes: Dedicated estate-sale company. Angle: buy/take the unsold books on the final day of each sale.

leads.name: Pfeiffer's Estate Sales
leads.notes: Announces sales by email — ask to join their list so you see sales early.

leads.name: My Estate to Liquidate
leads.address: 1923 E Red River St, Victoria, TX 77901
leads.notes: Full estate liquidation incl. clean-out; reviews mention decades of books/collectibles. Angle: unsold books at closeout.

leads.name: The Estate Sale Shoppe
leads.notes: Storefront reseller of estate goods — may have steady book turnover to offload.

leads.name: Tickled Pink Estate Sales
leads.notes: Estate-sale company, Victoria.

leads.name: Crossroads Estate Sales
leads.notes: Estate-sale company, Victoria.

leads.name: Texas Junk Removal
leads.address: 4822 Lake Granbury Dr, Corpus Christi, TX 78413
leads.notes: Does apartment/home clean-outs after moves and deaths — exactly where books get dumped. Pitch: free pickup saves them volume + tipping fees.

leads.name: Armadillo Disposal
leads.notes: Small responsive crew, lots of clean-outs. Same divert-from-landfill pitch.

leads.name: Texas Proud Junk Removal & Demolition
leads.notes: Same-day clean-outs, 5.0/160. Strong Victoria-market haul lead. Divert-books pitch.

leads.name: Y'all Call I Haul
leads.notes: Moving + haul-off; handles apartment/home move-outs where books pile up.

leads.name: Haul-lelujah Junk Removal
leads.notes: Kingsville-market haul-off. Good for TAMUK-area clean-outs.

leads.name: Texas Grime Dumpster Rental
leads.notes: Dumpster rental, not full-service haul — weaker, but their customers fill dumpsters during clean-outs. Low priority.

leads.name: 361 Junk Removal
leads.notes: Junk removal, Victoria.

leads.name: Rockin D Roll Offs
leads.notes: Dumpster roll-offs, Kingsville — weaker (rental, not haul), customers fill during clean-outs.

leads.name: FD Debris Disposal
leads.notes: Roll-offs + cleanouts, Alice market.

leads.name: Dumpster Dudez of the Coastal Bend
leads.notes: Dumpster rental, Kingsville.

leads.name: Coastal Bend Waste
leads.notes: Waste/haul service, Rockport.

leads.name: Rockport Rolloffs
leads.notes: Dumpster roll-offs, Rockport.

leads.name: Texas A&M University-Corpus Christi
leads.notes: Mary & Jeff Bell Library. Universities deaccession the densest, most resellable books. Ask for Collection Development / Access Services, not the front desk.

leads.name: Corpus Christi ISD — Administration
leads.notes: Gateway to ~60 campus libraries. Ask the district library coordinator how end-of-year weeding is handled district-wide — one call opens many campuses.

leads.name: Coastal Bend College
leads.notes: Auto-pulled. Find the librarian on the campus/district staff directory; weeding peaks April–May.

leads.name: Del Mar College

leads.name: Texas A&M University-Kingsville

leads.name: Incarnate Word Academy
leads.address: 2920 S Alameda St, Corpus Christi, TX 78404

leads.name: South Texas Vocational Technical Institute
leads.address: 2000 S Padre Island Dr, Corpus Christi, TX 78416
leads.notes: Smaller library; technical/trade titles resell well. Lower priority.
